body:
# Howie Lempel

[Howie Lempel](https://www.linkedin.com/in/howie-lempel/) Howie Lempel is a policy director at the [Secure AI Project](https://secureaiproject.org/). Previously, he held leadership roles at [Open Philanthropy](https://www.openphilanthropy.org/), [Effective Ventures](https://ev.org/), and [80,000 Hours](https://80000hours.org/). In a past life, he worked at the [Brookings Institution](https://www.brookings.edu/).
text: Howie Lempel Howie Lempel Howie Lempel is a policy director at the Secure AI Project. Previously, he held leadership roles at Open Philanthropy, Effective Ventures, and 80,000 Hours. In a past life, he worked at the Brookings Institution.
